update:
The Assured Open Source Software free tier includes an updated list of curated
binaries for the Go, Java, and Python languages. 
 For more information, see  List of supported Java and Python packages for the
Assured OSS free
tier  and  List of supported
Go packages for the Assured OSS free
tier .
Assured Open Source Software (Assured OSS) now supports Go packages. For more information, see  Download Go packages using direct repository access for the free tier .
You can now verify the signatures on Assured OSS artifacts using checksums.

Assured OSS premium tier is available as part of Security Command Center Enterprise. The premium tier includes an expanded package list, a secure proxy server for Java, Python, and Javascript packages, and enriched metadata support. For more information, see  Overview of Assured Open Source Software  and  Integrate with Assured OSS for code security .
Assured Open Source Software is generally available. For information about the product, see  Overview of Assured Open Source Software .
